title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at PayU - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Risk Analyst Vacancy at PayU - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at PayU are looking for an experienced Risk Analyst based out of Jabalpur. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About PayU:
PayU is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Power BI

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with PayU!
